definition: CREATE TRIGGER profiles_set_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.profiles FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_updated_at()

CREATE TRIGGER projects_set_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.projects FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION set_updated_at()
